Dialog.name: TRL_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 36}Enemies who are {f 0 1 2}Confused{f 0 1 27} will roam around unsteadily, as though drunk.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 36}{f 0 1 2}They move slowly, and are prone to missing their attacks{f 0 1 27}, making them prime targets to pick off with Chance Encounters.[n]{f 1 1}
